mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CHARACTER_LIKE (CHARACTER_NO, LIKE_TYPE, LIKE_TYPE_ID, DISP_SN, CREATE_DTIME, UPDATE_DTIME) VALUES (#{characterNo}, #{likeType}, #{likeTypeId}, ( SELECT DISP_SN FROM ( SELECT IFNULL(MAX( DISP_SN ) + 1 ,1) as DISP_SN FROM TB_CHARACTER_LIKE WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND LIKE_TYPE = #{likeType}) TMP ), now(), now())
